description: Core SunSweeper company information, service offerings, positioning, and service area.

company.name: SunSweeper
company.tagline: The Solar Panel and Roof Cleaning Experts
company.short_description: SunSweeper provides professional solar panel cleaning, roof washing, pressure washing, and specialty exterior cleaning services for residential and commercial properties.
positioning: Specialists in solar panel and roof cleaning
Experienced with both residential and commercial properties
Focused on safe methods, proper equipment, and long term surface care
Not a generic window washing company

discounts.notes: Discounts may be available, but no specific percentage should be promised unless confirmed.

services.name: Solar Panel Cleaning
services.description: Professional cleaning of rooftop and ground mounted solar panels using solar safe methods designed to improve appearance and restore production.
best_for: Properties in dusty or agricultural environments
includes: Removal of dust, pollen, bird droppings, and surface buildup
Use of purified water when appropriate
Use of solar safe tools and methods
Visual attention to panel condition during service
key_points: Dirty panels can reduce solar production
Agricultural dust and marine layer residue are common on the Central Coast
Rain does not fully clean solar panels
Regular cleaning helps maintain output and appearance
recommended_frequency: Every 6 to 12 months for many homes
More frequently for dusty, agricultural, or high bird activity areas

services.name: Roof Washing
services.description: Professional roof cleaning using low pressure or surface appropriate methods to remove dirt, algae, and organic buildup while protecting roofing materials.
best_for: Homes with staining, buildup, or insurance related appearance concerns
includes: Evaluation of roof type before cleaning
Use of roof appropriate cleaning methods
Removal of visible buildup and staining where appropriate
key_points: Roofs require the correct method for the specific roofing material
High pressure is not automatically appropriate for all roofs
Roof appearance can matter for property value and insurance concerns

services.name: Pressure Washing
services.description: Exterior surface cleaning for residential and commercial properties using pressure washing where appropriate.
includes: Removal of dirt, grime, and surface buildup
key_points: Pressure washing is best for durable hard surfaces
Not every surface should be pressure washed
Method selection depends on material and condition

services.name: Gutter Cleaning
services.description: Removal of debris and blockage from gutters to restore water flow and reduce the risk of overflow and water damage.
key_points: Clogged gutters can lead to overflow and water intrusion
Routine maintenance helps reduce bigger repair issues

services.name: Mobile Home Carport Gutter Clearing
services.description: Specialized cleaning and restoration of enclosed mobile home carport edge gutters that commonly fill with dirt, roots, plants, and sediment.
best_for: Overflowing or plant filled carport gutters
includes: Restoration of water flow through enclosed gutter channels
key_points: These are not normal open gutters
They are often hard to access and difficult for homeowners to clean
Restoring flow can help prevent overflow and water related damage
services.customer_friendly_value_statement: This service restores hidden drainage channels that are often packed with dirt, roots, and plant growth.

services.name: Commercial Solar Cleaning
services.description: Cleaning of commercial solar installations including rooftops, large arrays, and other business or institutional properties.
key_points: SunSweeper handles both residential and commercial work
Commercial jobs may require custom planning and quoting

response_style_notes: Speak like a knowledgeable local expert
Guide the customer toward next steps
